closeParentOnEsc.description: When in a submenu, determines whether pressing the Escape key closes the entire menu.

defaultOpen.description:
Whether the submenu is initially open.
To render a controlled submenu, use the open prop instead.

disabled.description: Whether the component should ignore user interaction.

highlightItemOnHover.description: Whether moving the pointer over items should highlight them.

loopFocus.description: Whether to loop keyboard focus back to the first item.

onOpenChange.description: Event handler called when the submenu is opened or closed.

onOpenChangeComplete.description: Event handler called after any animations complete when the submenu is opened or closed.

open.description: Whether the submenu is currently open.

orientation.description: The visual orientation of the submenu.
